execute.description: Indicates if there are permissions to execute.

read.description: Indicates if there are permissions to read.

edit.description: Indicates if there are permissions to edit.

admin.description: Indicates if there are permissions for admin.

EntryScope.description:
Type of the entry:
- `dash` — dashboard
- `widget` — chart
- `dataset` — dataset
- `folder` — folder
- `connection` — connection

createLimitedEntryBinding.description: Permission to create limited entry binding.

type.description: Specified type of the entry from scope (e.g. type of the connection or visualization type for charts).

public.description: Indicates if the entry is public.

workbookId.description: ID of the workbook the entry belongs to.

collectionId.description: ID of the collection the entry belongs to.

isLocked.description: Indicates if the entry is locked.

nextPageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

entryIds.description: ID of the entries to get relations for.

linkDirection.description:
The direction of the link relatively to the original entry:
- `from` — entries that are linked to the original entry
- `to` — the original entry is linked to the entries

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return.

pageToken.description: Token for retrieving the next page of results.

revId.description:
Version ID for the QL chart.
If the field is empty, you will get the current version of the QL chart.

entryId.description: ID of the entry being privately embedded.

privateParams.description: Array of signed parameters that are provided as part of the token.

createdBy.description: ID of the user who created the embedding.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the embedding was last updated.

post.description: Returns the specified DataLens entries relations.
Lists embeddings of the specified entry.
Lists keys for embedding of the specified workbook.
Deletes the specified key for embedding.
Returns the specified key for embedding.
Lists entries from the specified directory.
